programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Wacky hijinks of counselors and campers at a less-than-average summer camp

programme.title: The Dirt Bike Kid
programme.desc: When his mother sends Jack off with money to buy groceries he happens to lay his hands on a dirt bike which has supercharged magic powers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBh 106
programme.desc: TBh 106

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has made a deal with Lucy Wayne the secretary of suave movie star Lane Haggard for them to stay for two weeks at the Shady Rest Incognito as Mr Jones Haggard according to Miss Wayne needs to get some rest and relaxation away from prying public eyes But upon their arrival Miss Wayne believes Uncle Joe has duped her First Uncle Joe has told what seems like the entire valley about their stay

programme.title: Munsters 217
programme.desc: Munsters 217

programme.title: Addams Family 112
programme.desc: Addams Family 112

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E04
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E04

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A priest who is giving last rights to a woman on death row is seduced and plans and unimaginable escape from the death house with a very tragic ending Later Violet Rodriguez attempts to escape the same way hoping for better results

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George is the perfect houseguest for all the McCoys - except Grampa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kates mother and her fiancé visit the McCoys Kate feels theres something not right about the couple

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As music critics Max and the Chief enter the world of symphonic music and must save a contact from an exploding piano

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and while Bobbie Sue nurses him back to health BJ reminisces about the many beautiful women in his past

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitlers birthday

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 7 Fractured Fairy Tales Jack and the Beanstalk Peabodys Improbably History Ponce De Leon Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 8

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Stench an agent of MAD has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible making it valueless Inspector Gadget guards the national gold reserve at Fort Bucks

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie falls for Jack Chenault but will she move to Alaska with him Twins Judy and Joanie unhappy with marriage consider switching husbands Separated ventriloquists Mike and Pat Harmon are in the same cabin and entertain in the lounge

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology When a Taelon is killed in the same manner the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing gifts the chance to make things right to three criminals who break out of Houma Prison

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans joy turns to horror when the first child born on the Alpha matures into a five year old in a matter of hours This is only a prelude to the arrival of formless alien fugitives- who plan to inhabit Alphas population

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne works for Charley Dolan who is given 24 hours to vacate his property A gang run by Len Garth is forcing people off their land He burns the newspaper office killing the owner Dolan offers money to rebuild the paper

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller have less than 48 hours to prevent a politically motivated assassination by a mentally unstable but very accurate marksman

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force takes on the absolute ruler of a Middle East nation who is running a secret slave market Barney poses as a slave part of an effort to construct a replica of the slave cells before escaping Phelps poses as a slave trader and Rollin as an Interpol investigator Finally Cinnamon will be the bait for the trap The ruler of the country has a brother who married a British wife Amara The brother if he assumed power would abolish slavery in the country -- but he has accepted assurances that slavery doesnt exist there As part of the plan Willy abducts Amara and she is put in the IMF replica of the slave cell

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A friendly country girl has a crush on Kimble and wants to help him escape on the condition she can go with him as the Sheriff and Lt Gerard close in on them

programme.title: Capricorn One
programme.desc: Three astronauts are set to go on a space mission to Mars However when they detect a critical failure in the spaceship NASA asks them to film a fake landing to avoid public humiliation

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: Enter the Ninja

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chad Anheliger is ready to take on Rick Pfiefer at HK37. Chad is bringing his strong grappling and his natrual ability as a fighter to this match.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Coralie Dixon

programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.desc: Steamer defects to the Guardians but theyre suspicious when he reveals Cy-Kills new scheme to overthrow Earth

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Orion a professional hunter gets Saw Boss permission to hunt Jayce without any interference Orion is fascinated by Jayces skill and wants him as a trophy prize Orion kidnaps Jayce and puts him on a planet for the hunt to begin

programme.desc: A radioactive meteor crashes on Earth and VENOM steals it by disguising Switchblade as a UFO

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes
